TETHER Mint is Live!

If you are a Token holder, you are entitled to 1 free mint. Mint rights are limited. So hurry! Launched in 2014, Tether tokens (USD₮) pioneered the stablecoin model and are the most widely traded. Tether tokens offer the stability and simplicity of fiat currencies coupled with the innovative nature of blockchain technology, representing a perfect combination of both worlds.
